selectLayerForJSX: Выберите слой, чтобы увидеть его JSX-код
connectionTestMissingAPIKey: Enter an API key before testing.
connectionTestMissingBaseURL: Enter a base URL before testing.
connectionTestMissingModel: Enter a model ID before testing.
connectionTestInvalidBaseURL: Base URL is invalid. Use a full URL like https://api.example.com/v1.
connectionTestAuthFailed: Authentication failed. Check your API key.
connectionTestModelNotFound: Model not found. Check the model ID.
connectionTestAPITypeMismatch: This endpoint does not appear to support the selected API type. Try Completions or Responses.
connectionTestBrowserNetworkFailed: Could not reach this endpoint from the browser. Try the desktop app or use an endpoint with CORS enabled.
connectionTestNetworkFailed: Could not reach the endpoint. Check the URL and your network connection.
connectionTestUnknownFailed: Connection test failed. Check the provider settings and try again.
oneKeyManyModels: Один ключ для 100+ моделей от разных провайдеров.
describeCreateOrChange: Опишите, что вы хотите создать или изменить.
pasteRoomLinkOrId: Вставьте ссылку на комнату или ID
updateInstallPrompt: Скачать и установить сейчас? После установки обновления приложение перезапустится.
updateUnavailable: Обновления пока недоступны. Сначала опубликуйте подписанный релиз с latest.json.
keySavedReplace: Key saved — enter new to replace
copyJSXReference: Скопировать справку по JSX-свойствам в буфер
fontSettingsDesktopDescription: Доступ к системным шрифтам, онлайн-провайдерам, резервным наборам и кэшу загрузок.
fontSettingsBrowserDescription: Разрешите браузеру доступ к локальным шрифтам и управляйте онлайн-провайдерами шрифтов.
allowBrowserFontAccess: Разрешите доступ браузера к шрифтам, если системные шрифты отсутствуют.
downloadMissingWebFonts: Загружайте отсутствующие веб-шрифты через включённых провайдеров.
webFontProvidersRequireDesktopApp: Каталоги провайдеров онлайн-шрифтов недоступны в веб-приложении. Скачайте настольное приложение, чтобы просматривать и загружать шрифты провайдеров.
downloadFallbackPacksDescription: Загрузите резервные CJK- и арабские шрифты перед открытием файлов, которым они нужны.
localFontAccessNotGranted: Доступ к локальным шрифтам не предоставлен.
downloadedFontCacheClearFailed: Не удалось очистить кэш загруженных шрифтов.
cloudStorageHint: Optional S3-compatible bucket (AWS, Backblaze B2, R2, MinIO…). Files are stored under open_pencil_storage/. For the web app, set bucket CORS first (copy JSON below).
cloudConnectionSuccess: Connected. Namespace ready — web app can use this bucket.
cloudConnectionFailed: Could not connect to cloud storage.
cloudLoadFailed: Could not load canvases from cloud storage.
cloudConnectionSuccessDesktop: Connected. Namespace ready. Bucket CORS updated for the web app origins when possible.
cloudCorsHint: Test connection tries to set bucket CORS automatically when needed. Desktop can always apply CORS; the web app only if the bucket already allows this site.
cloudCorsCopied: CORS JSON copied — paste into bucket CORS settings
cloudCorsBrowserHelp: The browser blocked access to your bucket. Click Copy CORS JSON, paste it into Backblaze/AWS bucket CORS, wait ~1 minute, then test again. Or run Test connection once from the desktop app (it can apply CORS without the browser block).
cloudConnectionSuccessWithCors: Connected. Bucket CORS was applied automatically for the web app.
cloudCorsCopyFailed: Could not copy CORS JSON to the clipboard.
cloudCorsAutoFailedDesktop: Connected to storage, but automatic CORS update failed. Check that the access key can change bucket CORS.
cloudCorsAutoFailedBrowser: Storage works, but the browser could not update CORS. If the web app breaks later, use Copy CORS JSON.
settingsDescription: Cloud storage, AI providers, and app preferences.
cloudHomeLoading: Loading your files from the cloud…
cloudDropImportHint: Drop .fig or .pen files here to upload them to the cloud.
cloudUsageEmpty: No usage data yet. Test connection or refresh.
cloudUsageHint: Size of OpenPencil data in this bucket (open_pencil_storage/). Providers do not expose free space over S3, so this is usage — not “% full”.
cloudUploadPleaseWait: Please wait — this may take a moment for large files.
cloudUploadLargeFileHint: Large file — upload can take several minutes depending on your connection. Keep this tab open.
cloudSyncOfflineHint: Showing files on this device; cloud sync will catch up when online
